name: Big Creek Park
description: Big Creek Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, IL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Canton Family YMCA
description: Canton Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, IL. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
